title: ServiceInstance
description: A service instance registered in ZooKeeper via Apache Curator service discovery.

id.description: Unique identifier for this service instance.

name.description: Service name used to group instances.

address.description: Host address where this service is running.

port.description: Port number this service is listening on.

sslPort.description: SSL port if the service supports HTTPS.

registrationTimeUTC.description: UTC timestamp (milliseconds) when this instance was registered.

enabled.description: Whether this service instance is currently enabled for discovery.

payload.description: Optional user-defined payload data attached to this service instance.
